case_title: MAUDE MARY NEWT et al VS. DIANE MULLINS et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONSERVATORSHIP OF THE ESTATE OF MAUDE MARY NEWT, BY AND THROUGH MARY BRYANT, CONSERVATOR ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 2.0 DAYS

NOTICE OF MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ON JAN-02-2008 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPARTMENT 611. NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, JURY TRIAL SET FOR JAN-14-2008 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON JUL-20-2007 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON NOV-07-2007 IN 206, PLAINTIFF CONSERVATORSHIP OF THE ESTATE OF MAUDE MARY NEWT'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL AND/OR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 1/14/08 IS CONTINUED TO 4/14/08 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. THE CURRENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE VACATED AND A NEW SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE SET AND MAILED BY THE COURT. DISCOVERY ACCORDING TO THE NEW TRIAL DATE. WRITTEN ORDER PENDING. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERK: EBURA/DLOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR #4280 (206)
1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONSERVATORSHIP OF THE ESTATE OF MAUDE MARY NEWT, BY AND THROUGH MARY BRYANT, CONSERVATOR AS TO DEFENDANT MULLINS, DIANE DOES 1 THROUGH 10

COURT TRIAL CALENDAR HELD ON JUL-08-2008 IN DEPT. 606 FOR FINAL CLOSING ARGUMENTS. MATTER IS TAKEN UNDER ADVISEMENT. PARTIES TO SUBMIT PROPOSED JUDGMENT NO LATER THAN 7/18/08. JUDGE TOMAR MASON, CLERK MARIA OLOPERNES-PENA, REPORTER PATRICK HEARD #11005 (D606).

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CONSERVATORSHIP OF THE ESTATE OF MAUDE MARY NEWT'S MOTION TO AMEND COMPLAINT. COURT ADOPTS AND MODIFIES ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. COMPLAINT IS TO BE FILED BY FEBRUARY 29, 2008 AND ANSWER TO BE FILED AS SPECIFIED BY CODE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
